subTitle: Inspector Pandey orders the constables to bring him the man they nabbed. Soon after, Jethalal and Bhide are stunned to see the supposed thief.

subTitle: When they finally confront Dewan, the members learn about his ancestral 90-carat ruby. They also learn about its value and the threat he faces.

title: CID

subTitle: When a boy dressed in women's clothes commits suicide in a college, Team CID is called to investigate. Although he was ragged, the team must determine if it was a cover-up for a larger conspiracy.

title: CID
subTitle: When Team CID find three headless bodies in a house, they note that Daya seems familiar with the place. Meanwhile, more clues link Daya to the crime scene although he recollects nothing.

subTitle: In order to repay a huge debt to a drug dealer, addict Raunak tries to rob a family friend. He escapes when the man dies and Team CID find traces of a drug at the crime scene.

title: CID
